name: Papa Murphy's International LLC
validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Maryland special risk: franchisor financial condition calls into question ability to provide services — validated by FY2024 net loss of $(12.6M) and $44.3M impairment
System contraction: 17.4% decline in franchised units over 3 years (1,212→1,001). 96 terminations in 2024 — is this stabilizing or accelerating?
Brand Marketing Fund deficit of $(7.5M) — who bears the shortfall and what happens if it grows?
Gag clause on former franchisees limits due diligence ability
Item 19 provides only Net Sales — no cost data, no EBITDA. Cannot model unit-level profitability from FDD alone.
Exhibit D Franchise Agreement not clause-walked — guaranty scope, liquidated damages detail, cross-default triggers not confirmed from primary source
Long-term intercompany loan of $708M from common-control entity — nature, terms, and repayment obligations unclear from FDD text alone
Table 1 vs Table 3 franchised outlet count discrepancy (1,212 vs 1,210 for start of 2022)
Dan Rudolph (VP Operations) personal bankruptcy via JND Tropics LLC (Tropical Smoothie)
Table 1 vs Table 3 franchised start count 2022: 1,212 vs 1,210
Company-owned count end 2024: Table 4 shows 44, Item 1 states 43
Brand Marketing Fund deficit carryover labeled as from 2022 but should be from FY2023
